sections.label: Verse 1
lines: A lungdamte hong pai un, An lakna la hong sa un;
Phalbi guahsia zukma in, An khempeuh
I kisapna khempeuhte, Pasian in hong pia eite;

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Leitung khempeuh Pasian’lo, Amah phatna’ng ankung po;
le tahum hong pokhawm, Nuamna, dahna hongkhang khawm;
Teh neih khit ciang hong gah a, A nung ciangin
An nei Topa in Na lo, Ko nong hah ding kong ngen zo.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Tua ni ciang i Topa in, An si seep ding lo panin;
A taksa teng kaikhawm ding, A tawntungin nuamsa

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Hong pai meng in Topa aw, Innah hong ciahpih ta aw;
A tawntung a siangtho ding, Nangmah tawh omkhawm den ding;
hong pai aw, Innah hong ciah pih ta un.
